configs.purpose: bounded evaluation-order and working-value read-discipline model covering acyclic order selection, stable/prior value reads, changed-value publication, verified-clean finalization, diagnostic short-circuit rejection, cycle rejection, and no-torn candidate bundle checks

semantic_equivalence_statement: This run checks bounded TLA model evidence only. It does not change dependency graph construction, invalidation, rebind behavior, recalc tracker behavior, evaluation order implementation, working-value reads, TraceCalc behavior, TreeCalc/CoreEngine behavior, OxFml/OxFunc behavior, publication semantics, rejection policy, pack decisions, or service readiness.
